_meta.notes: Trigger values: on_hit, on_critical_hit, on_failed_save, on_critical_failed_save, on_hit_or_failed_save, start_of_turn, end_of_turn, aura_enter_or_start_turn, passive, reaction, on_death. dc_formula='actor_dc' means use the creature's class/spell DC.

grab.note: Monster uses 1 action after a successful Strike with Grab listed in damage. Target is Grabbed. Can also maintain or Restrain a currently Grabbed creature.

improved-grab.note: Free action version: automatically Grabs target on hit without spending an additional action.

knockdown.note: Monster attempts to Trip the creature as a 1-action follow-up after a successful Strike. No MAP applied or accrued.

improved-knockdown.note: Free action version: automatically attempts Trip after a successful Strike.

push.note: Monster attempts to Shove the creature as a 1-action follow-up. On success pushes 5 ft, crit success pushes 10 ft.

improved-push.note: Free action Shove after successful Strike. On success pushes 5 ft, crit success 10 ft.

pull.note: Monster attempts to Reposition the creature closer to itself. On success moves 5 ft closer, crit success 10 ft closer.

trip.note: Strike weapon trait: allows using Athletics to Trip as part of or after the attack (varies by context; on weapons it enables the Trip action).

disarm.note: Strike weapon trait: allows using Athletics to Disarm as part of or after the attack.

shove.note: Strike weapon trait: allows using Athletics to Shove.

rend.note: After hitting the same enemy with two consecutive Strikes of the listed type in the same round, monster automatically deals that Strike's damage again.

constrict.note: Deals listed bludgeoning damage to all Grabbed/Restrained creatures. Basic Fortitude save.

greater-constrict.note: Enhanced Constrict: same as Constrict but typically higher damage die.

swallow-whole.note: Swallows a grabbed creature of the listed size or smaller. Swallowed creature is Grabbed and takes listed damage per round. Escape DC listed.

engulf.note: Monster Strides through spaces. Creatures in path make Reflex save or become Engulfed (Grabbed). Escape DC provided.

trample.note: Strides up to double Speed through spaces of listed size or smaller. Basic Reflex save vs listed Strike damage.

ferocity.note: Reaction: when reduced to 0 HP, stay at 1 HP instead. Wounded value increases by 1. Stops working at Wounded 3.

stench.note: Failure: Sickened 1. Critical failure: also Slowed 1 as long as sickened.

frightful-presence.note: Will save on first entering aura. Failure: Frightened 2. Critical failure: Frightened 4. Success: immune for 1 minute.

Grab.note: Standard glossary Grab. 1 action after successful Strike. Can upgrade to Restrained with 2 actions.

Knockdown.note: 1 action after successful Strike: attempts Trip (no MAP).

Push.note: 1 action after successful Strike: attempts Shove (no MAP).

Pull.note: 1 action after successful Strike: Repositions target closer.

Constrict.note: Deals listed damage to all grabbed/restrained creatures. Each makes basic Fortitude save.

Greater Constrict.note: Enhanced version of Constrict, typically larger damage die.

Swallow Whole.note: Swallows grabbed creature. Creature is grabbed inside, takes damage per round, can escape with listed DC.

Engulf.note: Strides double speed through spaces. Creatures in path: Reflex save or Engulfed (Grabbed). Failure: take damage and become grabbed inside.

Trample.note: Strides double speed. Basic Reflex save vs listed Strike damage for each creature in path.

Ferocity.note: Stay at 1 HP instead of going down. Wounded value increases by 1.

Frightful Presence.note: On entering aura. Success: immune 1 minute. Failure: Frightened 2. Critical failure: Frightened 4.

Gibbering.note: Each creature beginning its turn in aura: Will save or Confused 1 round. Success: immune 1 minute.

Paralysis (Ghoul/Ghast).note: Living non-elf creature hit must succeed Fortitude or become Paralyzed. New save at end of each turn, DC decreases by 1 each save.

Paralysis (Gelatinous Cube).note: Creature engulfed or hit: Paralyzed unless succeeds Fortitude save. New save at end of each turn to recover.

Paralyzing Touch (Lich).note: Critical failure: permanently paralyzed and prone, appears dead.

Paralytic Venom (Chuul).note: Exposed when transferred to tentacles and at start of each turn grabbed by tentacles.

Dark Naga Venom.note: Stage 3: Unconscious with no Perception check to wake, 1d4+1 minutes.

Abyssal Rot (Bebilith).note: Drained condition is cumulative to maximum Drained 4.

Ghoul Fever.note: Progressive disease with void damage stages; death results in rising as a Ghoul.

Slowing Frost (Gelugon).note: Applies to any melee hit from gelugon's weapons or unarmed attacks.

Cursed Wound (Clay Golem).note: Curse lasts until healed to max HP. Healing requires DC 29 counteract check.

Berserk Slam.note: Knocks target Prone on hit (flesh golem/clay golem while berserk).

Drain Life (Devourer).note: Each failed save increases Drained by 1, to max Drained 4.

Essence Drain (Astradaemon).note: Both Doomed and Drained increase by 1 on failed save (existing value increases).

Draining Glance (Bodak).note: Reaction triggered when living creature within 30 ft starts its turn. Failure: Drained 1.

Death Gaze (Bodak).note: Target within 30 ft. Failure: Drained increases. Creatures with Drained 4 or Doomed may die.

Terrifying Touch (Banshee).note: Will save DC increases by 5 on a critical hit. Critical failure also applies Stunned 4.

Petrifying Gaze (Basilisk).note: Stacks with Petrifying Glance. Second failed save while already Slowed causes permanent Petrified.

Derghodaemon's Stare.note: Non-evil targets only. Immune 10 minutes on success.

Grievous Strike (Babau).note: Counts as two attacks for MAP. Deals +2d6 damage and inflicts Frightened 2 on hit.

Spotlight (Blindheim).note: Critical success: unaffected. Success: Dazzled 1 round. No failure/critical failure listed beyond that.

Strangling Fingers (Choker).note: Automatic Grab on hit. Grabbed creature is also suffocating (can't speak, can't cast verbal spells, can't activate command components).

Dimensional Tether (Bebilith).note: Target is Restrained and tethered; also under Planar Tether effect (DC 29). Escape DC 29.

Web Trap (Drider).note: Creature is Immobilized and stuck to nearest surface. Escape DC 21.

Cave Fisher Filament.note: Grabbed by sticky filament. Fisher can Pull (Reposition) grabbed creature 15 ft closer as action.

Paralyzing Display (Chernobue).note: Critical success: unaffected. Immune 1 minute after attempting save.

Corrupting Gaze (Ghost).note: Basic Will save vs void damage. Failure also inflicts Stupefied 1 for 1 minute.

Draining Touch (Ghost).note: Ghostly hand Strike deals no damage but Drains 1 on hit for 1 day.

Curse of the Werecreature.note: Affects humanoids only. Each full moon: new Fortitude save or transform until dawn.

Dominate (Vampire).note: Eye contact required. Success: immune to that vampire's Dominate for 24 hours.

Drink Blood (Vampire).note: Drains 1 per use (Drained condition stacks, max Drained 4 typical).

Curse of the Cairn Linnorm.note: Triggered when a creature kills the linnorm. Failure: permanent Enfeebled 2 plus accelerated aging.

Stunning Chain (Cornugon).note: Only on critical hit with spiked chain. Failure: Stunned 1 round. Critical failure: Stunned 1d4 rounds.

Chain of Malebolge (Cornugon).note: Pulls creature 5 feet closer and Grabs with spiked chain. Escape DC given.

Spray Acid (Ankhrav).note: Basic Reflex save. Also deals 1d6 persistent acid damage.

Hallucinogenic Cloud (Basidirond).note: Failure: powerful hallucinations while in cloud plus 1d4 rounds after. Various random hallucination effects. Lasts 5 rounds.

Rupturing Venom (Chernobue).note: Stage 1: poison+bludgeoning damage. Stage 2: poison+bludgeoning + Enfeebled 2.

Breath Weapon (Dragon, Repulsion Gas).note: Bronze dragon secondary breath. Failure: Fleeing from the dragon.

Hurricane Blast (Djinni).note: Success: avoid movement. Critical failure: Prone + forced movement.

Death Throes (Balor).note: On death: 100-foot fire explosion. Half fire resistance applies. Immune creatures use one better outcome.

Aura of Flame (Balor).note: Foes starting turn in aura take fire damage. Grabbed/restrained creatures take double damage.

Void Healing.note: Undead-style healing. Damaged by vitality energy, healed by void energy.

Sneak Attack.note: Extra precision damage against Off-Guard creatures with finesse/agile/ranged attacks.

Attack of Opportunity.note: Reaction: Strike against triggering creature. Disrupts manipulate actions on critical hit.

Reactive Strike.note: Same as Attack of Opportunity (remaster term). Disrupts on critical hit.

Power Attack.note: Counts as 2 attacks for MAP. Deals extra die of weapon damage.

Light Blindness.note: After exposure, immune to blinding until 1 hour in darkness again. Always Dazzled in bright light.

Aura of Rot (Lich).note: Eating or drinking in area requires flat DC 5 check or Sickened 1.

Bonds of Iron (Annis Hag).note: Grapple at range via Athletics. Lasts until creature Escapes (DC 24).

Envelop (Cloaker).note: Attack vs Reflex DC. Hit: target is Restrained inside the cloaker. Attacks against cloaker deal half to cloaker, half to victim.

Infectious Bite (Akata, Void Death).note: Affects only Medium/Small humanoids. Final stage: death and rising as a hostile creature.

Confusing Gaze (Bandersnatch).note: Triggers when a creature ends its turn in the aura.

Pain Quills (Bandersnatch).note: Each subsequent failed save increases Drained by 1, to max Drained 4.

Arrow of Despair (Baykok).note: Critical hit: target uses one worse degree of success. Critical failure paralysis: can attempt Will save each turn to end early.

Wasting Curse (Baykok).note: Each full rest: must save or Drained increases instead of decreasing. Reaching Drained 5 is lethal.

Petrifying Gaze (Medusa).note: End of turn in aura. Can activate/deactivate aura as 1 action.

Focus Gaze (Medusa).note: Targets creature within 30 ft. Immune until start of medusa's next turn after attempting save.

Hungry Winds (Harpy).note: Failure: pulled adjacent to harpy, which then makes a jaws Strike. If pulled airborne, falls.

Putrid Plague (Harpy).note: Sickened and unconscious can't be reduced until disease is cured.

Luring Song (Harpy).note: Fascinated creatures move toward the harpy on their turns. Ends when harpy attacks or the target takes damage.

Captivating Song (Harpy).note: Creatures that fail are Fascinated and compelled to approach. Immune 1 hour on success.

Stunning Strike.note: Various creatures have versions of this: critical hit forces Fortitude save or Stunned.

Regeneration.note: Dying value never increases beyond 3 while active. Deactivated by specific damage types (listed per creature).

Swarm Mind.note: Still subject to mental effects that affect all creatures in area.

Telekinetic Whirlwind (Demilich).note: All in aura become Concealed (to each other). Entering or starting turn in aura takes bludgeoning damage.

Trap Soul (Demilich).note: Failure: creature dies and soul is trapped in gem. Success: Drained 2 (not trapped). Critical success: no effect.

Devour Soul (Devourer).note: If slain, creature's soul is trapped; can't be resurrected without powerful magic.

Electric Reflexes (Flesh Golem).note: Attempts Grapple against adjacent creature. Success: grabbed + 3d6 electricity. Critical success: 6d6 electricity.

Reactive Slime (Babau).note: Also deals acid damage to the weapon on critical failure.

Aura of Disquietude (Aura ability exampl.note: Generic aura-based fear effect template used by multiple creature types.

Curse (Generic).note: Generic curse pattern. Most curses persist indefinitely, reduced only by specific counteract or remove curse effects.

Constrict (Large creature variant).note: Same as Constrict, but larger creatures deal higher base damage.

Disease (Generic).note: Progressive affliction. Level = monster's level. Stages worsen on failed saves, improve on successes.

Poison (Generic).note: Progressive affliction. Level = monster's level. Common effects per stage: persistent damage, enfeebled, clumsy, slowed, paralyzed, unconscious.

Spore Tendrils (Drakauthix).note: Creatures adjacent take poison + persistent poison. Grabbed creatures take -4 to save.

Soul Siphon Aura (Astradaemon).note: Living spirits/incorporeal undead in aura take spirit damage each round.

frightened.note: Most common value is Frightened 2 on failure, Frightened 3-4 on critical failure. Reduces at end of each turn.

paralyzed.note: Target is Paralyzed. Usually can retry save each round. Incapacitation trait typically applies.

grabbed.note: Target is Grabbed (Off-Guard and can't move away). Escape with Athletics or Acrobatics vs monster's Athletics or Escape DC.

restrained.note: Stronger than Grabbed. Target is Off-Guard, can't move, and takes -2 to attack rolls.

immobilized.note: Target can't use move actions or leave current space.

prone.note: Target is Prone: -2 to attack rolls, Off-Guard vs melee, +2 vs ranged. Stand up costs action.

off-guard.note: Formerly Flat-Footed. -2 to AC. Applied when flanked, Grabbed, Restrained, Prone, etc.

stunned.note: Loses actions equal to stunned value (spent at start of turn). Stunned 1 = loses 1 action next turn.

slowed.note: Loses actions equal to slowed value at start of turn. Slowed 1 = loses 1 action per round.

sickened.note: Penalty to all checks and DCs equal to sickened value. Can attempt flat check to reduce (once per action).

drained.note: Penalty to attack rolls, Perception, saves, and skill checks equal to value. Max HP reduced by level × value.

enfeebled.note: Penalty to Strength-based attack rolls, damage rolls, and Athletics equal to value.

clumsy.note: Penalty to Dexterity-based attack rolls, AC, Reflex saves, and Dexterity skills equal to value.

stupefied.note: Penalty to Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma-based checks, Will saves, and spell attack rolls equal to value. May need flat check to Cast Spells.

doomed.note: Dying value at which you die increases by doomed value. Doomed 1: die at Dying 3 instead of 4.

blinded.note: Cannot see. -4 to Perception, -2 to attack rolls, all creatures Concealed or Undetected to you.

dazzled.note: Vision impaired. All creatures Concealed to you (must succeed DC 5 flat check to affect them).

deafened.note: Cannot hear. -2 to Perception, -2 to initiative, automatic failure on checks requiring hearing. -2 to attack rolls if spell requires verbal component.

fleeing.note: Must spend actions each turn to move away from source. Cannot willingly approach the source.

unconscious.note: Cannot act, -4 to AC, Off-Guard. Typically from knockout or high-stage poison.

confused.note: Acts randomly (determined by random roll). Can attack own allies. Immune to further confusion while already confused.

fascinated.note: -2 to Perception and skill checks. Can't take reactions. Ends when affected by a hostile action or an ally uses an action to end it.

controlled.note: Someone else directs your actions. Typically from Dominate or possession effects.

petrified.note: Turned to stone. Can't act, hardness/HP of stone, doesn't age. Often permanent unless dispelled or condition cleared.

dying.note: Unconscious and making recovery checks. Die at Dying 4 (or less with Doomed). Wounded increases on recovery.

wounded.note: Increases Dying value by wounded value if reduced to 0 HP again. Also applied by Ferocity reaction.

persistent_damage.note: Takes listed damage at end of turn. Flat check DC 15 (or listed DC) at end of turn to remove. Spending action to remove gives +10 circumstance bonus.

quickened.note: Gains 1 additional action per turn, but can only use it for specific action types.

fatigued.note: -1 to AC and saves. Can't explore. Typically from lack of sleep or certain disease stages.

cone.description: Emanates from creature in a 90-degree arc. Size is the length. Reflex save is typical.

line.description: Straight line from creature. Width typically 5 feet. Reflex save is typical.

burst.description: Sphere centered on a point. Reflex save is typical.

emanation.description: Sphere centered on the creature. Used for auras. Typically automatic for auras, save for triggered effects.

save_types.fortitude: Constitution-based. Resists physical effects, poison, disease, death, draining.
save_types.reflex: Dexterity-based. Avoids or reduces area damage, movement effects.
save_types.will: Wisdom-based. Resists mental, fear, charm, confusion, compulsion effects.
save_types.flat: No modifier. Used for bleeding recovery, effects with fixed probability.

degree_of_success_map.critical_success: Exceeds DC by 10 or more (or natural 20 beats DC). Typically: no effect, immune, or reduced effect.
degree_of_success_map.success: Meets or beats DC. Typically: half damage (basic saves) or no condition.
degree_of_success_map.failure: Does not meet DC. Typically: full damage and condition applied.
degree_of_success_map.critical_failure: Misses DC by 10 or more (or natural 1 fails). Typically: double damage, worse conditions, or upgraded severity.
degree_of_success_map.basic_save: Critical success: no damage. Success: half damage. Failure: full damage. Critical failure: double damage. No conditions from basic saves.
